measurement_note: Size is R, the source call-row count. Every tier gives user 1 one large daily partition whose first and last calls are both with user 2; intermediate calls use distinct partners. The window reference orders each partition once. A correct correlated query repeats ordered endpoint lookups for normalized rows, completes all tiers, and fails by superlinear scaling.

benchmark: two hundred fifty-six calls in one daily partition
